Grindelia is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits. Grindelia has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine properties, making it useful for relieving allergic reactions, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Grindelia include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and terpenoids. Grindelia is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are available in health food stores and online.
